signals.title: Institutional AI: A Governance Framework for Distributional AGI Safety
signals.abstract: Framework for governing deployed multi-agent LLM systems by specifying and enforcing institutional structure at runtime. Uses repeated Cournot markets to evaluate effects on collusion-related market structure.

signals.title: SaPaVe: Active Perception and Manipulation in Vision-Language-Action Models for Robotics
signals.abstract: Active perception and manipulation framework for VLA models, accepted at CVPR 2026. Enables robots to actively explore and manipulate objects using vision-language grounding.

signals.title: Witnessed Quantum Time Evolution (WQTE): Efficient Eigen-Energy Spectra Without Eigenstate Preparation
signals.abstract: Novel quantum algorithm for efficiently computing eigen-energy spectra of arbitrary quantum systems without requiring eigenstate preparation, overcoming a key limitation of conventional approaches.

signals.title: Legal Alignment for Safe and Ethical AI: Harnessing Law for Technical Alignment
signals.abstract: Explores how designing AI systems to operate in accordance with legal rules can address alignment problems. Harnesses law for both normative and technical aspects of alignment.

signals.title: To Defend Against Cyber Attacks, We Must Teach AI Agents to Hack
signals.abstract: AI agents enable economically viable attacks through parallelization. Only offensive AI agents can match the predictability and scale needed to counter AI attackers. Proposes adversarial AI defense framework.

signals.title: Quantum Disruption: Post-Quantum Attackers Reshape Blockchain Security and Performance
signals.abstract: Systematization of knowledge examining cryptographic primitives vulnerable to quantum attacks in consensus protocols and transaction validation. Explores post-quantum adaptations across blockchain implementations.

signals.title: Mixture-of-Depths Attention (MoDA): Efficient Transformer Architecture with Dynamic Depth Allocation
signals.abstract: Improved perplexity and downstream task performance by 1.17-2.11 percentage points across model scales. Dynamically allocates computation depth to tokens based on complexity.

signals.title: StereoWorld: Camera-Conditioned Stereo World Model for Geometric Consistency
signals.abstract: Camera-conditioned stereo world model generating stereo videos end-to-end using RGB modality while maintaining geometric consistency and efficiency through novel attention mechanisms.

signals.title: Agentic AI in Financial Markets: Architecture, Applications, and Systemic Implications
signals.abstract: Comprehensive analysis of agentic AI systems in financial markets including LLMs, retrieval-augmented generation, tool-using agents, memory systems, and autonomous planning for heterogeneous financial data.

signals.title: LTX-2: Open-Source Audiovisual Diffusion Model with Dual-Stream Transformer
signals.abstract: Open-source audiovisual diffusion model that generates synchronized video and audio content using dual-stream transformer architecture with cross-modal attention and classifier-free guidance.

signals.title: Synthetic Data Generation for Brain-Computer Interfaces: Overview, Benchmarking, and Future Directions
signals.abstract: Comprehensive review of synthetic data generation for BCIs addressing limited data availability, individual variability, and non-stationarity of brain signals. Benchmarks existing approaches.

signals.title: Nonadiabatic Geometric Quantum Computation with Binomial Codes in Superconducting Systems
signals.abstract: Protocols for nonadiabatic geometric quantum computation showing relatively high average fidelity even under parameter fluctuations and decoherence. Practical approach for quantum gates in current technology.

signals.title: MC-Search: Evaluating and Enhancing Multimodal Agentic Search with Structured Long Reasoning Chains
signals.abstract: Framework for evaluating multimodal agentic search systems using structured long reasoning chains. Identifies key bottlenecks in current agentic search pipelines.

signals.title: The Synthetic Web: Diagnosing Epistemic Weaknesses of Language Agents
signals.abstract: Adversarially-curated mini-internets to diagnose epistemic weaknesses of language agents. Creates controlled web environments to test agent robustness against misinformation.

signals.title: Alien Science: Sampling Coherent Research Directions from Idea Atoms
signals.abstract: Published at ICLR 2026 Post-AGI Science and Society Workshop. Proposes methods for AI-driven scientific discovery by decomposing research into atomic idea units and recombining them.

signals.title: Improving LLM Safety Alignment with Dual-Objective Optimization
signals.abstract: Identifies limitations in Direct Preference Optimization for safety. Proposes dual-objective approach disentangling DPO into robust refusal training and targeted unlearning of harmful knowledge.

signals.title: Altermagnetism: A New Class of Spin-Compensated Magnetic Materials with Momentum-Dependent Spin Splitting
signals.abstract: Altermagnetism has emerged as a new class of spin compensated magnetic materials exhibiting momentum dependent spin splitting despite zero net magnetization. Opens new avenues for spintronics.

signals.title: High-Fidelity Controlled-Unitary Gates via Rydberg Anti-Blockade Holonomic Quantum Computation
signals.abstract: High-fidelity controlled-unitary gates based on non-adiabatic holonomic quantum computation using Rydberg anti-blockade. Achieves suitable evolution paths through reverse engineering of pulse parameters.

signals.title: CARE-RFT: Confidence-Anchored Reinforcement Finetuning for Reliable Reasoning in LLMs
signals.abstract: Confidence-anchored reinforcement finetuning for reliable reasoning in LLMs, accepted at IEEE Conference on AI 2026. Calibrates model confidence during chain-of-thought reasoning.

signals.title: Specialized Pretraining (SPT): Domain-Specific Foundation Models with 1.75x Compute Reduction
signals.abstract: SPT consistently improves domain test loss by 0.8-2.0% and reduces required compute by up to 1.75x compared to conventional finetuning. Demonstrates that domain-specific pretraining outperforms generic pretraining+finetuning.

signals.title: Multimodal Fact-Level Attribution (MuRGAt): Verifiable Reasoning Across Video, Audio, and Text
signals.abstract: Benchmark for evaluating fact-level multimodal attribution requiring reasoning beyond direct observation. Models must generate answers with explicit reasoning and precise citations across modalities.

signals.title: SurgSigma: Large-Scale Multimodal Foundation Models for Surgical Intelligence with Hierarchical Chain-of-Thought
signals.abstract: Surg-R1 reasoning-enhanced multimodal foundation model interprets complex surgical scenes through hierarchical chain-of-thought reasoning. Large-scale multimodal data for surgical intelligence.

signals.title: ComFree-Sim: GPU-Parallelized Analytical Contact Physics Engine for Scalable Robotics Simulation
signals.abstract: GPU-parallelized analytical contact physics engine for scalable contact-rich robotics simulation and control. Eliminates need for complementarity problem solving.

signals.title: MedAI: Evaluating TxAgent Therapeutic Agentic Reasoning in NeurIPS CURE-Bench
signals.abstract: Evaluation of therapeutic agentic reasoning systems in the NeurIPS CURE-Bench competition. TxAgent demonstrates planning and reasoning for drug interaction analysis and treatment recommendation.

signals.title: ReloQate: Transient Drift Detection and In-Situ Recalibration in Surface Code Quantum Error Correction
signals.abstract: Novel approach for detecting and correcting transient drift in surface code quantum error correction. In-situ recalibration improves logical error rates without interrupting computation.

signals.title: Continual Meta-Learning: LLM Agents Jointly Evolving Policies and Reusable Behavioral Skills
signals.abstract: Framework enabling LLM agents to jointly evolve policies and reusable behavioral skills while minimizing downtime. Achieves continual adaptation without catastrophic forgetting.

signals.title: DAM-VLA: Dynamic Action Model-Based Vision-Language-Action Framework for Robot Manipulation
signals.abstract: Dynamic action model-based VLA framework for robot manipulation. Integrates dynamic models with vision-language grounding for more precise and adaptive robotic control.

signals.title: Bridging Embodiment Gaps: Deploying Vision-Language-Action Models on Soft Robots
signals.abstract: Methods for deploying VLA models trained on rigid robots to soft robots with fundamentally different dynamics. Addresses the embodiment gap in robot learning transfer.

signals.title: Wild-Drive: Off-Road Scene Captioning and Path Planning via Robust Multi-modal Routing and Efficient LLMs
signals.abstract: Combines vision and language models for autonomous navigation in off-road environments. Robust multi-modal routing with efficient LLMs for scene understanding and path planning.

signals.title: MM-THEBench: Comprehensive Benchmark for Hallucinations in Reasoning MLLMs
signals.abstract: Comprehensive benchmark for assessing hallucinations of intermediate chain-of-thought in reasoning multimodal LLMs. Reveals systematic patterns in reasoning hallucinations.

signals.title: Mechanism Design with Learning Agents: Self-Confirming Mechanisms and Optimal Beliefs
signals.abstract: Formalizes self-confirming mechanisms in environments where designers learn from agents behavior. Shows equilibrium mechanisms are optimal given the designers belief.

signals.title: NIST FIPS 205: Post-Quantum Cryptographic Standards and Timeline for Algorithm Deprecation
signals.abstract: Analysis of NIST post-quantum cryptographic standards with plans to deprecate quantum-vulnerable algorithms (RSA, ECDSA, EdDSA, DH, ECDH) by 2030 and fully retire by 2035.

signals.title: CARE: Clinical Accountability in Multi-Modal Medical Reasoning with Evidence-Grounded Agentic Framework
signals.abstract: Accepted at ICLR 2026. Evidence-grounded agentic framework for clinical accountability in multi-modal medical reasoning. Addresses hallucination risk in medical AI through citation-anchored responses.

signals.title: The Alignment Flywheel: Governance-Centric Hybrid MAS for Architecture-Agnostic Safety
signals.abstract: Proposes governance-centric hybrid multi-agent system that achieves architecture-agnostic safety through iterative alignment refinement. Creates positive feedback loop between deployment and alignment.

signals.title: Paired Serial Dictatorship: Pareto Efficient and Envy-Free Allocation Mechanisms
signals.abstract: Paired serial dictatorship mechanism where agents signal preferences to determine priority. Any deterministic allocation is Pareto efficient and envy-free, dominating random serial dictatorship.

signals.title: RoboReward: Automated Training and Evaluation of Vision-Language Reward Models for Robotics
signals.abstract: Open-source dataset and benchmark for automating training and evaluation of vision-language reward models for robotics. Reduces human labeling requirements by 80%.

signals.title: Boltzmann-Based Exploration for Robust Decentralized Multi-Agent Planning
signals.abstract: Boltzmann-based exploration strategy for robust decentralized multi-agent planning. Achieves near-optimal coordination without centralized communication in stochastic environments.

signals.title: Autonomous O-RAN: Multi-Scale Agentic AI Framework for Real-Time Network Control
signals.abstract: Multi-scale agentic AI framework for real-time network control and management in O-RAN architecture. Enables autonomous network optimization across multiple temporal and spatial scales.

signals.title: MM-BRIGHT: Multi-Task Multimodal Benchmark for Reasoning-Intensive Retrieval
signals.abstract: First multimodal benchmark for reasoning-intensive retrieval. 2,803 real-world queries spanning 29 technical domains with four tasks of increasing complexity across modalities.

signals.title: Domain-Direct Band Gaps: Extreme 2D-2D Band Gap Engineering in Twisted Diamond
signals.abstract: Introduces domain-direct band gaps as a concept with material realization of extreme 2D-2D domain-direct band gap in twisted diamond. Opens pathways for novel optoelectronic devices.
